profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk produces and sells alcoholic beverages in Indonesia. It offers its products under the Cap Tikus 1978, Daebak Soju, and Daebak Spark brand names. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Minahasa, Indonesia. PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Maju Beverage Minahasa.
